ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(
ISNEW(),
RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Current_25_10_16', OR( ISBLANK( BillingCountry), ISBLANK( Website ), ISBLANK(Name), ISBLANK( Employees_Max__c ), ISBLANK( Employees_Min__c ), ISPICKVAL( SW_Industry__c,'') ),
$Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User', $Profile.Name <> 'Integration User No DF', $Profile.Name <> 'Infer API' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please populate the fields: Country, Website, Account name, Employees Min, Employees Max, SW Industry.
